name: Italian Potato Salad (Harper)
recipeIngredient: 1 small Bell Pepper, Chopped, About 1/2 Cup
3 tbsp Olive Oil or Vegetable Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of water to boil. Add the potatoes and cook until tender, about 30-35 minutes. Drain and let cool.
2. Cut the potatoes into half-length slices, then crosswise into 1/4-inch pieces.
3. Halve the artichoke hearts.
4. Mix the potatoes, artichoke hearts, pimientos, bell pepper, onion, and olives in a bowl.
5. Combine the basil leaves, dried basil, olive oil or vegetable oil, white vinegar, salt, and pepper in a separate container.
6. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and toss to coat evenly.
7. Cover and refrigerate for about 2 hours until well chilled.
